what_it_does: An essentially empty Markdown file containing only a single '#' header line with no title text and no body.
observations: File is one line: '# ' with no heading text and no content following it.
Named as a companion '.prompt.md' to icons_tones.html, suggesting it was meant to hold the generation prompt for that preview card.
standouts: Empty placeholder despite its name implying it should carry the prompt that produced icons_tones.html.
conventions: Follows a '<card>.prompt.md' naming convention pairing a prompt file with a preview card, but is unpopulated.
concerns: Empty/stub file — carries no prompt content, so the convention it implies (a recorded prompt per card) is unfulfilled here.
notes: An empty .prompt.md stub paired with icons_tones.html — the prompt that would belong here was never written.
questions: Was a prompt intended to live here, and is its absence intentional or an unfinished stub?
purpose_vs_actual: Cannot confirm a stated purpose — the file is empty; its name implies it should hold the icons_tones generation prompt, which it does not.
apparent_themes: Per-card prompt provenance (by naming convention only)
intention_signals: Appears intended to record the prompt used to generate the paired icons_tones preview card, supporting reproducibility/provenance — but is currently a placeholder.
contribution: Contributes (by name) the convention of a per-card prompt-provenance file, though this instance is empty.
summary_for_embedding: An empty Markdown file containing only a bare '#' header, named as the prompt companion to the icons_tones preview card.
intention_for_embedding: To hold the generation prompt for the icons_tones preview card as provenance, though left empty.
